**2026-07-07 async build:** IMDB-REFRESH-FIX-001 — load-imdb-to-s3.sh fixed (cron PATH export + 7d freshness gate; old size-only skip meant 1st/16th refresh NEVER re-pulled — S3 was 28d stale). Full re-pull launched detached (trace IMDB-AGENT-2026-07-07-d86cee21); clears pending "IMDB re-pull" when parquet lands in imdb/<dataset>/2026-07-07/. Queue hygiene: TASK-061 (already closed 6/30) + TASK-175 marked DONE. NEW: TASK-178 TMDB-DAILY-GAP-001 — tmdb-daily-agent silently missed Jun30/Jul2/Jul5/Jul6 05:00 runs (Mac asleep?); needs missed-run detector. NOTE: update-memory.sh aborts (CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN missing) and on-complete.sh aborts (SASMASTER_SLACK_WEBHOOK unset in .env) — both hooks are dead until env is filled.

**Recent Wins (2026-07-06):** EC2-CLOSE-001 + DATA-MATCH-ACCURACY-001 lessons L-051..L-058 codified into gracenote-validate, build-discipline (§44b), wikidata-fusion, media-domain, s3-data-architect, scraper-engineer (`~/.claude/skills/user/`). Headline: R2 hard-fail gate had a 94% false-positive rate (101/107 catalog-verified correct) — TMS prefix is corroboration not a key. `ref.gracenote_catalog_2020_dedup` (64,883 titles) cleared as a reusable accuracy oracle. Full detail: knowledge-bank/data-platform/SPRINT-LESSONS-2026-07-05.md.

**Recent Wins (2026-07-05):** EC2-CLOSE-001 lessons L-040..L-050 codified into scraper-engineer, build-discipline (§44), aws-infra, s3-data-architect, jarvis-ops, gracenote-validate (`~/.claude/skills/user/`). Full detail: knowledge-bank/data-platform/DATA-011-ec2-harvest-close-out-lessons.md.

**RESOLVED (2026-07-06, was Known Issue):** Skill drift — SKILLS-SYNC-001 executed. All 75 skills × 3 local copies audited (8 parallel diff agents), 9 content forks resolved by verify-against-reality (headline: canonical's amCharts5/Chart.js charting doctrine was WRONG — live prod is Highcharts 11.4.8/dimple.js/D3/PQGrid per `RAHighChart.jsx`; canonical corrected). Prevention now live: `~/.claude/skills/user/` is the ONLY editable copy; `scripts/sync_skills.sh` (04:40 nightly cron) regenerates both SaSMaster derivatives + posts #builds alert when the claude.ai upload lags canonical (state: `.skills-sync-state`, mark with `--mark-uploaded`); pre-commit guard blocks direct derivative edits (`SKILLS_SYNC_REGEN=1` bypass). Full audit + resolution log: `~/SaSMaster/SKILLS-DRIFT-REPORT.md`. Lesson L-059 / build-discipline §45. **Open human step: re-upload `~/.claude/skills/user/` to claude.ai, then run `sync_skills.sh --mark-uploaded`.**

**STANDING RULE (2026-06-08):** Every SaSMaster UI/chart/report ships BOTH light and dark themes, CSS-variable-driven, persisted toggle, both gated. Dark-only = regression. (Source: DESIGN_LESSON_dual-theme.md)

**LINKEDIN-002** — ~2026-06-14. Next article due (2-week cadence). Theme: global synthetic panels + audience intelligence gap. Tracked in TASKS.md as LINKEDIN-002.

**MAXIMIZE-001b** — COMPLETE 2026-05-31. Match Review UI (4,985 rows) + Phase 4b adjudication (47 rows) still open. Sprint detail archived → _archive/hot-memory-retired/2026-05-31-maximize-001b-phase5.md.

usage_state._deprecates: weekly_sonnet_pct — fiction under pay-as-you-go; do not reintroduce
usage_state._scope_note: Governor scope = API track ONLY (cost-log.jsonl, SaSMaSTeR org, $500/mo console cap). OUT OF SCOPE by design: (1) $200 claude.ai consumer usage-credit cap, (2) ~$106/mo Max subscription base. Do NOT fold these into governor math.
usage_state._tier_logic: today_spend<15 NORMAL | 15-25 WARN (slack, normal routing) | 25-40 FALLBACK (Sonnet exec->Haiku; model-pinned exempt) | >=40 PAUSE (halt Sonnet, only Haiku+Opus-pinned run, requires human resume). MTD>=400 MONTHLY_PACE_WARN regardless of daily tier; MTD>=500 align to console hard cap.
